title: Is Claude down? Hundreds of users report issues in Delhi, Mumbai, Ahmedabad; Anthropic reacts
summary: Claude, the AI chatbot by Anthropic, experienced service disruptions on Monday, affecting cities like Delhi and Mumbai. Downdetector reported issues related to Claude.ai and login/logout paths, while Anthropic confirmed that the Claude API is functioning correctly and is under investigation.

title: Stop buying gaming laptops for trading: Your trading laptop must have these specs to handle trading software
summary: Professional trading requires single-core CPU speed and Thunderbolt 4, not gaming GPUs. This guide reveals the specs that eliminate chart lag and slippage, ensuring your hardware matches the market speed.

title: Amid ‘Cancel ChatGPT’ trend, Anthropic launches feature to help users switch to Claude
summary: Anthropic has launched a new import memory feature for Claude, which allows paid users to bring memories from other AI chatbots. The feature comes at a time when Anthropic has seen strong public sentiment in its favour following the cancellation of its deal with the US government.

summary: Apple plans to unveil several new products this week, including the iPhone 17e, new MacBooks, and iPads. CEO Tim Cook has hinted at a multi-day launch starting 2 March, which could conclude with the event on 4 March.

title: Musk’s xAI to buy back $3 billion of debt early in run-up to IPO
summary: The company, which Musk recently combined with his rocket business SpaceX, is set to redeem its $3 billion of high-yield bonds at about 117 cents on the dollar, the people said, a significant premium that reflects the unusual move to pay down the obligation so early.

title: US Treasury says stopping use of Anthropic's tech
summary: The US Treasury Department said Monday it is ending use of all Anthropic products, following President Donald Trump's government-wide ban on the AI start-up after it rejected the Pentagon's demands.

title: Paramount debt to hit $79 billion after Warner Bros deal, no plan to sell cable assets
summary: The Warner Bros-Paramount Skydance merger will create a combined entity that would ​have a net debt of about $79 billion, Paramount ​said on Monday, as it ruled out any plan to divest or spinoff ​the cable assets.

title: UK fintech major Revolut to enter India soon; opens 'waitlist' for users
summary: UK fintech Revolut is preparing to launch its digital payment services in India. Indian users can now join a waitlist for the upcoming service. The platform will feature an INR-only prepaid wallet with UPI integration. Revolut plans to offer Visa cards for domestic and international use.

title: US Supreme Court declines to hear dispute over copyrights for AI-generated material
summary: The US Supreme Court has refused to consider a case about copyright for art created by artificial intelligence.
